title: lycopodiella contexta
intro: Lycopodiella contexta, also known as the context forked spike moss, is a type of small, perennial evergreen plant belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lycopodiella contexta include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
